_meta.description: Curated substitution mappings for COZYROC's Salesforce family — Source, Destination, Lookup, and the Salesforce Task control-flow component. Maps each to the closest native ADF activity / Mapping Data Flow transformation so a converted pipeline runs end-to-end without the third-party DLL on the host.
_meta.verification: Component type strings reflect the public COZYROC component catalog as of 2024-10. Customers should run `analyze_ssis_package` against one of their own .dtsx files and cross-check that the component_class_id observed by the parser matches one of the keys below — vendors occasionally rename components between releases.
_meta.audit_notes: Every Salesforce Source/Destination requires its own ADF Linked Service of type 'Salesforce' (or 'SalesforceServiceCloud'). The substitution shim only emits the activity shape; the linked service must be authored once per Salesforce org and referenced by name.

Cozyroc.SSISPlus.SalesforceSource.notes: Replace with a native ADF Salesforce source. Author a 'Salesforce' linked service (OAuth or username-password+security-token) and a Salesforce dataset; bind the dataset's 'objectApiName' parameter to the SObject the COZYROC source was reading. SOQL filters in the COZYROC component map to the dataset's SOQLQuery property.

type_properties._review_required: Set 'objectApiName' and 'SOQLQuery' to match the original SObject + filter.

Cozyroc.SSISPlus.SalesforceDestination.notes: Replace with a native ADF Salesforce sink (Mapping Data Flow). Insert/Update/Upsert/Delete operation maps directly from the COZYROC ActionType property to the ADF sink writeBehavior. Set externalIdFieldName when the original component used Upsert.

type_properties._review_required: Map ActionType (Insert/Update/Upsert/Delete) -> writeBehavior (insert/update/upsert/delete) and copy externalIdFieldName for upserts.

Cozyroc.SSISPlus.SalesforceLookup.notes: Replace with the native MDF Lookup transformation against a Salesforce dataset. Cache mode (Full/Partial/None) in COZYROC has no MDF equivalent — MDF lookups are always streaming joins; flag as a perf review item if the source SObject is > 1M rows.

type_properties._review_required: Confirm that the MDF streaming-join cost is acceptable; consider Cache transformation upstream for large SObjects.

Cozyroc.SSISPlus.SalesforceBulkSource.notes: Salesforce Bulk API source. ADF's Salesforce connector uses Bulk API automatically when row count exceeds the threshold; no separate setting required.

type_properties._review_required: No-op for ADF; just confirm the dataset references the same SObject.

Cozyroc.SSISPlus.SalesforceBulkDestinati.notes: Salesforce Bulk API destination. ADF Salesforce sink uses Bulk API automatically; copy ActionType -> writeBehavior as for the standard destination.

type_properties._review_required: Map ActionType -> writeBehavior; verify externalIdFieldName for Upsert.

Cozyroc.SSISPlus.SalesforceTask.notes: COZYROC Salesforce Task wraps Salesforce REST/SOAP calls (CreateJob, AbortJob, GetSession, etc.). Map each to a Web Activity hitting the corresponding Salesforce REST endpoint. Use the Salesforce Linked Service's OAuth token via @linkedService('LS_Salesforce').accessToken (custom expression).

type_properties._review_required: Set 'url' to the Salesforce REST endpoint (e.g. https://{instance}.salesforce.com/services/data/v59.0/...). Inject Authorization header from the linked service token.
